commands.review_summary:
The PR adds an ACP `agent:turn:end` internal hook event with typed context, ACP manager emission, docs, and focused tests.

PR surface: Source +90, Tests +209, Docs +3. Total +302 across 7 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a feature PR rather than a bug report. The review did source-trace a patch defect in the proposed lifecycle boundary, but there is no current-main bug reproduction to establish.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Manual review is needed because the remaining blockers are contributor real-environment proof and maintainer API-contract judgment, not a safe standalone automation repair lane.

target.title: feat(hooks): add agent turn end hook
target.body:
## Summary

Adds a clean `agent:turn:end` internal hook event for ACP runtime turn completion. This split intentionally keeps the event as a runtime lifecycle boundary only; it does not claim transcript/session-write durability.

## Changes
- Registers and validates `agent:turn:end` hook events with `sessionKey`, `success`, `durationMs`, and optional `errorCode` context.
- Emits the event from the ACP manager after terminal runtime turn handling and awaited ACP event-delivery callbacks.
- Documents the lifecycle-only contract and explicitly states that this event does not prove durable session writes.
- Adds focused ACP manager and internal hook tests for success and failure outcomes.

## Real behavior proof

- Behavior or issue addressed: confirms the split clean branch exposes only the ACP turn lifecycle hook, with no save/write-durability hook mixed into the review surface.
- Real environment tested: local OpenClaw source checkout on macOS at `/Users/mantis/Projects/openclaw-pr-turn-end-clean`, branch `feat/agent-turn-end-hook-clean`, head `9aecd5c23d`.
- Exact steps or command run after this patch: inspected the live checkout with `rg`, then ran the focused hook tests and full test typecheck from the same branch.
- Evidence after fix (terminal capture):
```text
$ git rev-parse --short HEAD
9aecd5c23d
$ rg -n "agent:turn:save|onBeforeTurnSaveHook" docs/automation/hooks.md src/acp/control-plane src/hooks
<no output; exit 1>
$ rg -n "agent:turn:end" docs/automation/hooks.md src/acp/control-plane/manager.core.ts src/hooks/internal-hooks.ts
docs/automation/hooks.md:58:| `agent:turn:end`         | After an ACP agent turn completes or fails                 |
docs/automation/hooks.md:139:**Agent events** (`agent:turn:end`): `context.sessionKey`, `context.success`, `context.durationMs`, and `context.errorCode` when the turn failed. For ACP turns, this is scheduled after the runtime emits the terminal turn event and the manager has awaited event delivery callbacks. It marks the runtime turn lifecycle boundary and does not guarantee the completed turn has been written to durable session state. Hook handlers run through bounded fire-and-forget dispatch; they are not awaited before later ACP state transitions or runtime cleanup. The event does not embed transcript text.
src/acp/control-plane/manager.core.ts:516:            "turn:end",
src/acp/control-plane/manager.core.ts:521:      "agent:turn:end internal hook failed",
src/hooks/internal-hooks.ts:180: * Context provided to `agent:turn:end` hook handlers.
src/hooks/internal-hooks.ts:188:  action: "turn:end";
$ node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/acp/control-plane/manager.test.ts src/hooks/internal-hooks.test.ts
[test] passed 2 Vitest shards in 7.37s
$ pnpm check:test-types
<exit 0>
```
- Observed result after fix: the clean branch contains `agent:turn:end` lifecycle wiring and docs, no `agent:turn:save` / save callback symbols, focused hook tests pass, and the branch typechecks.
- What was not tested: a full live ACP backend session on a production user account was not run from this branch.
- Proof limitations or environment constraints: the proof is from a local source checkout; the hook is internal and not user-visible without an installed hook handler.

## Testing
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/acp/control-plane/manager.test.ts src/hooks/internal-hooks.test.ts`
- `pnpm check:test-types`
- `pnpm exec oxlint src/acp/control-plane/manager.core.ts src/acp/control-plane/manager.types.ts src/acp/control-plane/manager.test.ts src/acp/control-plane/manager.turn-runner.ts src/hooks/internal-hooks.ts src/hooks/internal-hooks.test.ts`
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check --threads=1 docs/automation/hooks.md src/acp/control-plane/manager.core.ts src/acp/control-plane/manager.types.ts src/acp/control-plane/manager.test.ts src/acp/control-plane/manager.turn-runner.ts src/hooks/internal-hooks.ts src/hooks/internal-hooks.test.ts`
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD && git diff --check`

## Related
Related #37833
Split from #71399
